description: Statutory hydrotesting and examination of pressure vessels (Boiler B-501) every 2 years or after major repairs.
audit_evidence: INSP-PESO-2025: Hydrotest successful at 45 kg/cm2, certified by Vadodara Deputy Controller.
gaps: None, but fuel gas piping pitting noted near pipe rack support 12B requires rectification.

checklist.item: Hydrostatic pressure testing at 1.5x design limit
Calibrate and pop-test pressure relief valves
Ultrasonic thickness measurement of boiler shell

description: Minimum safety spacing of 15 meters between hydrocarbon gas compressors and active fired heaters or sub-stations.
audit_evidence: As-built layout drawings show distance from C-301 to MCC-03 substation is 11.8 meters (Required: 15.0m).
gaps: Substation MCC-03 is only 11.8 meters from compressor gas casing, violating the 15-meter buffer requirement.

checklist.item: Verify 15-meter separation buffer to fired sources/substations
Install positive pressurization in MCC-03 substation
Ensure high-level LEL gas detectors are interlocked to substation trip

description: Pressure plant operation safety instructions: Safe working pressure limits must be clearly displayed. Proper training for pressure gauge interpretation must be provided to operators.
audit_evidence: Operator training records (Nov 2025) and dial stickers visible on Boiler B-501 local control panels.

checklist.item: Clearly mark maximum safe pressure limits on dials/consoles
Provide logged annual safety refresher training for boiler operators
Maintain pressure testing logbooks on site

description: LEL gas detection sensors calibration and gas safety shutdown interlocks testing on a quarterly basis.
audit_evidence: Calibration logs exist for April, but July calibration is delayed due to instrument technician availability.
gaps: July quarterly LEL calibration is overdue by 5 days, posing a minor compliance deviation.

checklist.item: Calibrate all gas detectors with 50% methane test gas
Verify trip signal transmission to DCS and ESD valves
Test backup power supply batteries for gas detection cabinet
